MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Labor Appeal Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Plaintiff/Respondent: Andrea Ruotsi present in pro per with Witness Ann Hipshman, Esq.
No appearance by the Defendant/Appellant Seidael Advertising Inc. a California Corp a California Corp.
No appearance having been made by Appellant, Randolph & Hein, Inc. a California corp., and as requested by Respondent, the Court granted an Order granting dismissal of appeal of the Order, Decision or Award of the Labor Commissioner filed by Appellant.
Respondent to prepare an Order and submit to Dept. 218 for signature.
12:30 P.M. Order received in court and signed by Comm. Gargano.
